name: Chronicle
description: This app enables the end-user to search, analyze, and ingest the enterprise security data stored in the Chronicle using investigative, reputation, and ingestion actions

actions.name: List Ioc Details
actions.description: Return any threat intelligence associated with the specified artifact

parameters.name: artifact_indicator
parameters.description: Specify the artifact indicator

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Specify the artifact indicator value

actions.name: List Iocs
actions.description: List all of the IoCs discovered within the enterprise within the specified time

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Specify the time range of the search (Use this format <digit><d/h/m/s> where d=Days, h=Hours, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Specify the start time of the search (Use this format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ where y=Year, M=Month, d=Day, H=Hour, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specify the maximum number of IoCs results to return. You can specify between 1 and 10,000. (Default is 10,000)

actions.name: List Assets
actions.description: List all of the assets that accessed the specified artifact within the specified time

parameters.name: artifact_indicator
parameters.description: Specify the artifact indicator

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Specify the artifact indicator value

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Specify the time range of the search (Use this format <digit><d/h/m/s> where d=Days, h=Hours, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Specify the start time of the search (Use this format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ where y=Year, M=Month, d=Day, H=Hour, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Specify the end time of the search (Use this format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ where y=Year, M=Month, d=Day, H=Hour, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specify the maximum number of assets to return. You can specify between 1 and 10,000. (Default is 10,000)

actions.name: List Events
actions.description: List all of the events discovered within the enterprise on a particular device within the specified time

parameters.name: asset_indicator
parameters.description: Specify the asset indicator

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Specify the asset indicator value

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Specify the time range of the search (Use this format <digit><d/h/m/s> where d=Days, h=Hours, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Specify the start time of the search (Use this format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ where y=Year, M=Month, d=Day, H=Hour, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Specify the end time of the search (Use this format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ where y=Year, M=Month, d=Day, H=Hour, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: reference_time
parameters.description: Specify the time for the asset you are investigating (Use this format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ where y=Year, M=Month, d=Day, H=Hour, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specify the maximum number of events results to return (Default is 10,000)

actions.name: Domain Reputation
actions.description: Derive the reputation of the specified domain artifact (The reputation can be either of 'Malicious', 'Suspicious', and 'Unknown')

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Specify a domain name

actions.name: Ip Reputation
actions.description: Derive the reputation of the specified destination IP address artifact (The reputation can be either of 'Malicious', 'Suspicious', and 'Unknown')

parameters.name: destination_ip_address
parameters.description: Specify a destination IP address

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: List all of the security alerts tracked within the enterprise on particular assets and|or users for the specified time

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Specify the time range of the search (Use this format <digit><d/h/m/s> where d=Days, h=Hours, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Specify the start time of the search (Use this format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ where y=Year, M=Month, d=Day, H=Hour, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Specify the end time of the search (Use this format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ where y=Year, M=Month, d=Day, H=Hour, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specify the maximum number of results to return. You can specify between 1 and 100,000. (Default is 10,000)

parameters.name: alert_type
parameters.description: Specify the type of alerts to fetch

actions.name: List Rules
actions.description: List the latest versions of the rules created in the Detection Engine within the enterprise

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specify the number of rules to return (Default is 1000)

actions.name: List Detections
actions.description: List all the detections for the specific versions of the given Rule ID(s)

parameters.name: rule_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated Rule ID(s) (with or without versionId)

parameters.name: alert_state
parameters.description: Alert State to filter the detections

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Specify the time range of the search (Use this format <digit><d/h/m/s> where d=Days, h=Hours, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Specify the start time of the search (Use this format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ where y=Year, M=Month, d=Day, H=Hour, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Specify the end time of the search (Use this format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ where y=Year, M=Month, d=Day, H=Hour, m=Minutes, s=Seconds)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specify the maximum number of detections to return (Default is 10,000)

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Action handler for the on poll ingest functionality

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app
